+ MPI-xCCL: routes to NCCL/RCCL/HCCL by rank

Ring / Tree / NVLS by msg size
PyC Compiler · IR · Pass Manager · CUTLASS Kernels
Higher layers only call downward through defined interfaces.
No layer reaches across or upward.
Backend never knows which strategy is active.
